seoTitle: Barnes Bay vs Barrington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Barnes Bay and Barrington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Barnes Bay vs Barrington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barnes Bay and Barrington.
heading: Barnes Bay vs Barrington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barnes Bay, Tasmania and Barrington, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barnes Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Barrington (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barnes Bay or Barrington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barnes Bay has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Barrington scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barnes Bay scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Barrington scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barnes Bay or Barrington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barnes Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
